summary: Tested NEW billing/accounting system for TopBass marketplace. Backend: 100% (20/20 tests). Frontend: All new features verified. Full billing calculation verified: job_price=5000 -> fee=500 (10%) -> service_charge=5500 -> VAT=1017.50 (18.5%) -> total=6517.50
passed_tests: Billing calculation formula verified: 10% fee + 18.5% VAT
PUT /api/bookings/{id}/quote - handyman can quote job price
Quote updates booking status to 'quoted' with correct billing
Handyman can view billing for their booking
Checkout requires quoted booking (400 if no price)
Full billing flow: booking -> quote -> billing verified
UI: Admin accounting tab with 4 metric cards (Revenue, Fee, VAT, Handyman Pay)
UI: Bookings page has 'Quoted' filter tab
UI: Registration works for customer and handyman roles
UI: Bookings page loads for both customer and handyman
seed_data_creation: Multiple test handymen and customers created with TEST_ prefix for billing flow tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing/Accounting system fully tested. Key endpoints: PUT /api/bookings/{id}/quote (handyman quotes), GET /api/bookings/{id}/billing (get breakdown), POST /api/payments/create-checkout (Stripe), GET /api/payments/status/{session_id}, GET /api/admin/accounting (dashboard), PUT /api/admin/payouts/{id}/mark-paid. Billing formula: job_price + 10% fee = service_charge, then + 18.5% VAT = total. Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library with test key. Customer only sees service_charge + VAT, not the fee breakdown.
